conversation.content: Let's have an ecological protection lesson. Today we are going to learn about the Zangarmarsh Ecological Protection Law in the world of Azeroth, which has very distinct local characteristics.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.

The core rule of this law is: those who destroy the mushroom mycelium blankets of Sporeggar villages will be confined for twenty days, ordered to plant an equal area of mushrooms at the edge of the marsh, and simultaneously fined 50 gold coins; if destroyed multiple times, the imprisonment will be extended to ninety days and they will be permanently banned from entering the marsh.
I have written down the rules of this law.
The application scenario of this rule is the surroundings of all Sporeggar settlements.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this rule.
